query:
UPDATE pipelineDeals 
SET 
  estimatedMonthlyRevenue = 13333300,
  estimatedAnnualRevenue = 160000000,
  keyServices = '244 locations, 1,254 weekly cases, 5 service zones. Zone 1&2 Pittsburgh Metro & Surrounding: ~900 weekly cases ($5.50-$7.75/case, high volume core area). Zone 3,4,5 Central/Northern/Premium PA: ~350 weekly cases ($10.70-$18.00/case, higher margin specialized delivery). Transfer surcharge $2.25/case from Limerick. Large order discounts available.',
  notes = 'Submitted Jan 14, 2026. $1.6M annual value. 10% surcharge until L&M awarded >90% of Zone 1&2 volume. 3-year contract, CPI up to 5% annually. Q1 2026 start. Phased implementation. Zone 1&2 are core operational high-volume area. Zone 3-5 are higher margin specialized delivery. Fuel surcharge all-in based on PADD1B DOE price 01/01/2026.'
WHERE clientName = 'Southern Glazer''s Wine & Spirits';
